abyssal.autoRunStarted: 检测到深渊运行！计时器已启动。

rattingHelp.activeTokensHelp: Check on the characters screen if the token status is green. Expired tokens prevent synchronization.
rattingHelp.bountyTicksHelp: Synchronized every 20 minutes (standard game time). Use the "Sync ESI" button to update.
rattingHelp.bountyTicksText: Bounty Ticks: Synchronized every 20 minutes (standard game time). Use the "Sync ESI" button to update.
rattingHelp.characterPreparationText: For automatic tracking to work, your characters must be linked to EasyEve with the correct permissions.
rattingHelp.description: Learn how to configure and maximize your automatic profit tracking with Ratting.
rattingHelp.essPayoutsHelp: Appear in the wallet about 3 hours after the activity. If you close the activity, EasyEve will continue monitoring for 4 more hours.
rattingHelp.essPayoutsText: ESS Payouts: Appear in the wallet about 3 hours after the activity. If you close the activity, EasyEve will continue monitoring for 4 more hours.
rattingHelp.expertTip1: Prioritize Havens (Rock) and Sanctums for best ISK/Hour in Nullsec.
rattingHelp.expertTip2: Always click "Sync ESI" before finishing the activity to ensure the last tick was captured.
rattingHelp.expertTip3: ISK/hr calculation considers net profit accumulated divided by total operation time.
rattingHelp.importantText: CCP ESI may have a cache delay of up to 5 minutes. If you just received the tick in-game, wait a few moments before syncing.
rattingHelp.iskSyncText: EasyEve doesn't "read your screen", it queries the CCP server for new wallet journal entries.
rattingHelp.note: The system uses Faction and Site Name to suggest the best bonuses and calculate estimates.
rattingHelp.stepAText: Click on "Start New Activity" and select the Ratting icon (red crosshair).
rattingHelp.stepBText: Select the characters that will participate in the fleet and the local NPC Faction.
rattingHelp.title: Ratting Configuration Guide
rattingHelp.walletScopeHelp: It is essential that the character has the Wallet Journal read scope active. Without this, EasyEve cannot see Bounties and ESS payments.
rattingHelp.walletScopeText: Wallet Scope: It is essential that the character has the Wallet Journal read scope active. Without this, EasyEve cannot see Bounties and ESS payments.

mtu.inGameInstructions: Open cargo in EVE, Ctrl+A to select all, Ctrl+C to copy

salvage.inGameInstructions: Open cargo in EVE, Ctrl+A to select all, Ctrl+C to copy

lootList.title: Loot History
lootList.description: View and manage your MTU and salvage entries

helpModal.title: How to Start a New Activity
helpModal.subtitle: Follow these steps to configure and launch your fleet operation

step1.title: Select Activity Type
step1.description: Click on the activity type you want to track: Mining, Ratting, Abyssal, Exploration, or PVP. Each type has different configurations.

step2.title: Configure Tactical Settings
step2.description: Set your security level, space type, faction, and other options in the Tactical Configuration section. Click the ? icon for help on each option.

step3.title: Select Fleet Members
step3.description: Choose which characters will participate in this activity. You can assign fit templates to each member after selection.

step4.title: Launch Activity
step4.description: Click the Launch Activity button to start tracking. Your activity will appear in the Active Operations section.

helpModal.tip: Need more help? Click the ? button next to each configuration option for detailed explanations specific to that activity type.

tour.stepStartDescription: Click Start New Activity to open the operation setup dialog.
tour.stepTypeDescription: Choose Ratting to track bounties, ESS payouts, and anomaly performance.
tour.stepConfigDescription: Set Space, Hostile Faction, and Detected Anomaly. Optional: enable Auto Loot Tracking for container-based loot sync.
tour.stepFleetDescription: Select the characters joining this operation and assign fits when needed.
tour.stepLaunchDescription: Click Launch Fleet Operations to start tracking this activity in real time.
tour.stepCardDescription: This card summarizes the operation: live status, pilots, ISK metrics, sync controls, and quick actions (including ending the activity).

ratting.title: Ratting Guide
ratting.subtitle: Track your ratting income and anomalies
ratting.whatIsIt: Ratting tracks your NPC combat income from anomaly running. EasyEve syncs with CCP ESI to capture bounty ticks and ESS payouts automatically.
ratting.step1: Select your Security Level (Highsec, Lowsec, Nullsec, Wormhole)
ratting.step2: Choose your Hostile Faction based on the space you're ratting in
ratting.step3: Select the specific Anomaly from the detected list
ratting.step4: Optionally enable Auto Loot Tracking to track MTU/container loot
ratting.importantNote: Bounty ticks sync every 20 minutes. Click "Sync ESI" before ending the activity to capture the last tick.

mining.title: Mining Guide
mining.subtitle: Track your mining yield and ore values
mining.whatIsIt: Mining tracks your ore/ice/gas extraction and calculates market values in real-time based on current prices.
mining.step1: Select your Security Level (Highsec, Lowsec, Nullsec, Wormhole)
mining.step2: Choose Mining Category: Ore, Ice, Gas, or Moon
mining.step3: View the Valuable Ores preview to see expected yields
mining.importantNote: Prices update automatically. You can configure which ores to track in your profile settings.

abyssal.title: Abyssal Guide
abyssal.subtitle: Track your abyssal filament runs
abyssal.whatIsIt: Abyssal tracking calculates your net profit by comparing cargo before and after each run. Enter your initial cargo state to start.
abyssal.step1: Before running abyssal, open your cargo and copy all item names/quantities
abyssal.step2: Paste the cargo contents into the "Initial Cargo State" field
abyssal.step3: After completing the run, enter new cargo to calculate profit
abyssal.importantNote: The more detailed your cargo entry (with quantities), the more accurate your profit calculation will be.

exploration.title: Exploration Guide
exploration.subtitle: Track your relic and data sites
exploration.whatIsIt: Exploration tracks loot from relic and data sites. Enter your initial cargo to calculate what you found during exploration.
exploration.step1: Before scanning sites, copy your current cargo contents
exploration.step2: Paste into the "Initial Cargo State" field
exploration.step3: After exploring, add your collected loot to track total value
exploration.importantNote: You can add exploration loot manually during the activity. The system will calculate the delta from your initial state.

pvp.title: PVP Guide
pvp.subtitle: Track your PVP activities
pvp.whatIsIt: PVP tracking helps you record combat statistics and ship losses. More features coming soon.
pvp.step1: Select PVP as your activity type and add participating characters
pvp.step2: Manually log combat events and ship losses during the activity
pvp.step3: End the activity to view your combat summary

crab.title: CRAB Guide
crab.subtitle: Track your pirate faction sites
crab.whatIsIt: CRAB (Combat Anomaly Burn) tracks Pirate Faction sites similar to ratting. More features coming soon.
crab.step1: Select CRAB as your activity type
crab.step2: Configure space type and faction settings
crab.step3: Track your site completion times and rewards

escalations.title: Escalations Guide
escalations.subtitle: Track DED/escalated sites
escalations.whatIsIt: Escalations track DED-rated sites and their valuable loot. More features coming soon.
escalations.step1: Select Escalations as your activity type
escalations.step2: Track completed sites and their loot values
escalations.step3: View your escalation success rate and ISK/hour

about.description: Track your EVE Online activities simply and efficiently. Organized data, complete history and real-time analysis.
about.title: Why use EasyEve?

openSource.title: 完全透明
openSource.description: EasyEve 的全部代码公开，任何人都可以审查。我们坚持完全透明 — 你可以验证、贡献并按需调整项目。

screenshots.sectionDescription: 通过实时分析、装配、市场数据与深度洞察，提升你的 EVE 体验。

features.sectionDescription: EasyEve 提供强大的工具来追踪您的 EVE Online 活动 — 采矿、深渊、刷怪和探索 — 更多模块如装配和市场目前正在开发中。
features.realTimeDesc: 实时监控您的舰队行动。追踪团队进度，查看每个人的采矿情况，并实时协调行动。
features.lootAnalysisDesc: 获取采矿行动的详细细分。分析矿石类型、每小时价值，并导出数据进行市场分析。
features.miningStatsDesc: 所有采矿活动的综合统计。追踪周期、效率，并比较不同船只和地点的性能。
features.abyssalTrackerDesc: 追踪您的深渊空间 (Abyssal Deadspace) 历程。分析战利品、难度以及在深渊中的表现。
features.shipFittingDesc: 基于 SDE 属性与效果构建与分析装配，无需猜测槽位规则或叠加效应。
features.marketBrowserDesc: 在同一控制台查看价格与趋势，规划买卖与建制后勤。
features.ctaFits: 打开装配编辑器（即将推出）

infoModal.subtitle: Everything you need to know about EasyEve Premium

benefits.intro: Premium gives you access to all EasyEve features, with no limits on your industrial and combat operations in New Eden.

unlimitedFittings.title: Unlimited Fit Management（即将推出）
unlimitedFittings.desc: Create, manage and import unlimited ship fittings. Perfect for fleet operations with complex module configurations.

unlimitedTracking.title: Unlimited Activity Tracking
unlimitedTracking.desc: Track multiple activities simultaneously across all your characters. No limits on concurrent operations or fleet size.

leaderboard.title: Global Leaderboard Access
leaderboard.desc: Appear in the global rankings and compete with other pilots. Show your efficiency and earn achievements.

advancedTools.title: Advanced Tools
advancedTools.desc: Access detailed reports, data export, market analysis and more tools to optimize your operations.

benefits.cta: Ready to scale your operations? Subscribe to Premium and unlock the full potential of EasyEve.

howTo.title: How to Subscribe
howTo.step1: Transfer ISK to Easy Eve Holding's corporation in-game
howTo.step2: Include your Account ID in the transfer reason field
howTo.step3: Premium is activated automatically within 5-15 minutes

pricing.iskEquivalentDesc: Less than 2 hours of mining in a T1 exhumer or a few anoms in nullsec

compare.intro: Compare what you can do with a Free account vs Premium.
compare.cta: Upgrade to Premium to unlock all features and maximize your efficiency in New Eden.
